_human_review.notes: SA Stage B generated/autolabeled labels were reconciled by Codex for internal benchmark cleanup; project-owner approval is still required before promotion-ready status.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Desert Cloud Payments LLC (CR No. 2050-88-123456) by Najd Robotics Holding JSC (CR No. 1010-55-654321), Kingdom of Saudi Arabia; non-binding save for confidentiality, exclusivity, PDPL undertakings, and governing law.

Transaction Structure: Buyer to acquire 70% of the issued shares for SAR 148,000,000, with completion targeted within 120 days; subject to Kingdom Markets Authority (KMA) consent and Najd Securities Market issuer workflows for a post-closing reverse merger.

Data Export Approvals: Buyer’s data-export approval for group reporting (NDAIB/XT/2026/00051) is in place but will not commence until post-closing integration; no live reporting feeds will run pre-closing.
Shari’ah and Governance: Financing and consideration mechanics to be reviewed by Buyer’s Shari’ah Committee; no interest-bearing intercompany loans will be used for bridging.
personal data used for the transfer is minimised
automated minimisation and masking by default
Insider List will be maintained and provided to KMA upon request
no public disclosures on the Najd Securities Market will be made prior to KMA clearance
